case_number: Criminal Bail Application stands dismissed as not

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 692 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 06.02.2023 Mr. Kamran Ahmed R. Gorar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Mohsin Ali Khan, Special Prosecutor ANF..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant Criminal Bail Application, applicant Sharif S/o Ameer Bux Abro seeks post-arrest bail in Crime No.15 of 2022, registered at Police Station ANF, Sukkur under Sections 6, 9, 6(b) of CNS Act, 1997 and Sections 6, 9, 6(c) of CNS (Amendment) Act, 2022. His earlier application for the same relief bearing Cr. Bail Application No.2107/2022 was heard and dismissed by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-I/ Special Judge (CNS)/M.C.T.C-I, Sukkur vide order dated 14.12.2022. At the very outset, learned Counsel for the applicant states that the applicant would not press this application on merit, in case directions are given to the trial Court to conclude the trial within two months hereof. Learned Special Prosecutor ANF records not objection to the proposition of learned Counsel for the applicant on the ground that speedy trial is the right of every accused. Accordingly, instant Criminal Bail Application stands dismissed as not pressed with directions to the trial Court to conclude the trial preferably within a period of two months. In case of failure, the applicant shall be at liberty to repeat the bail application before the trial Court. J U D G E Abdul Basit
